programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Movie Maitnee-Jinde Meriye

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.desc: Jane and Jerry try to shoo the seagull out of the house, but it continues to flyaround, causing more chaos. The seagull starts to take over the house, making itselfat home and pus_hing Jane and Jerry out.The two siblings come up with a plan totake back their home

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Doctor Baby
programme.desc: Jane tries to put Jerry to sleep, but he _hinages in playful antics and mimics a castle warrior. Jane introduces him to a book about castles and warriors, igniting his curiosity. Jerry jumps around, fights imaginary battles with pillows, and eventually escapes through the window. Jane follows him outside where a chase ensues around a castle made of toys. After a playful confrontation, they both find comfort and settle down inside the castle, sharing a peaceful moment together.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 16
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure 2 Ep 31
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 16
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Minecraft, Roblox and More with Amy Lee
programme.desc: Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel! Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus oth

programme.title: Argo' s World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Box Yourself

programme.title: Chefclub Kids

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Robinhood EP 01
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdatta Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Eco India
programme.desc: Eco india challenges natural conflicts with inter-human solutions as they reflect sustaining self and surrounding. From “Changing Flora and Fauna”, Urban Visions being Sustainable”, “Greening Up- creating solutions for greenhouse and global warming” leading us to know how we could “Help Nature, Help Humanity”. As they go head on with “Protecting Seafood and ocean life”, “Addressing industrial Pollution” , land pollution , water pollution , modern solutions to hazardous pollutants, tackling food and water shortage , Recycling batteries, sustainable ways of life , protecting environment with modern and technological development issues and many more to create a better world.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Tornadoes they are the embodiment of severe weather. In this episode we show some of the most terrifying weather caught on camera from surviving a direct hit to a tornado in a typhoon. (S1 E09)

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: In these viral videos we witness how, in the blink of an eye, your day can become suddenly dangerous. Even on a beautiful day, when you're not expecting any severe weather at all, Mother Nature can sometimes be malicious and sneaky (S1 E02)

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Mother Nature unleashes some of her most deadly forces to wreak havoc in the air and unexpectedly terrify her victims. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: It's man versus nature in a race against time. Heart-pounding rescues captured on camera in these viral weather videos. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: In this episode we show some of the most extreme winter weather ever caught on camera, including a first-hand look at being buried by an avalanche. (S1 E08)

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather

programme.title: Science of Sound
programme.desc: Have you ever gotten a song stuck in your head? Marty Music sat down with Dr. Carole Scherling, a neuroscientist from Belmont University, to talk all about sticky lyrics and the science behind why some catchy tunes get stuck in our heads.

programme.title: Science of Sound
programme.desc: Music has the power to transport us back in time. Marty Music sat down with Nicole Richard, a neurologic music therapist, and professor from Belmont University to talk about how music affects our brains and stirs up memories.

programme.title: Science of Sound
programme.desc: Professional athletes use music to get psyched up for a big game. But why does music have the power to inspire, motivate, and make us cry? Marty Music finds out how music makes us move.

programme.title: Backyard Ballistics
programme.desc: Time for an apocalyptic challenge. Cheyenne has some awesome tests to put Jörg through his paces. He is being taken out of his comfort zone. No workshop, no power tools, no researched plan. Just Jörg, his knowledge and 3 tricky survival situations.

programme.title: Backyard Ballistics
programme.desc: Jörg & Cheyenne are challenged to create a Machine Gun Crossbow. They need to build a chassis, a magazine and an automatic firing and reloading mechanism. Can they build a fully automatic crossbow? And will it beat a team of crack crossbow shooters?

programme.title: Backyard Ballistics
programme.desc: Jörg & Cheyenne are challenged to build a Flaming Ballista. Jörg schools us about siege weaponry and they craft a plan on how they are going to build this machine! Cheyenne takes charge of the metalwork and Jörg takes charge of the rubber and wood.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: Host Steve Spangler presents amazing science stunts that your friends will not believe - but they're real! - from pre-sliced bananas to the way to crush raw eggs without turning them to mushy egg soup.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: Steve Spangler creates science toys, tricks and experiments that you can make using simple things you can find in your kitchen.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: One group of fourth grade students faces 'The DIY SCI Challenge.' Steve Spangler challenges them to invent a contraption that will keep an egg from breaking when it's dropped from a ladder.

programme.title: Power &
programme.desc: Al Baum likes to invent crazy machines that give a different perspective on mobility. They are not meant as practical mode of transportation, but they are fun.

programme.title: Power &
programme.desc: Ian Britt is het boss of Vurtego the extreme pogo stick that holds 8 world records and allows you to jump over as bus.

programme.title: Power &
programme.desc: Marc Hammerla is co-founder of the Lampuga, an electric surfboard that reaches up to 52 km/hour.

programme.title: Proof of Concept
programme.desc: Dianna dives through the looking glass in this paradoxical exploration of truth itself, where the left could be right, & right might be wrong. w/ guest Zach Pincince.

programme.title: Proof of Concept
programme.desc: Kyle Hill & Eugenia Cheng join the show to prove there is more than one infinity, that infinity is hidden all around us, & that we might actually be infinite ourselves.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There's a whole world and more than one spectrum of sensations that animals are aware of, yet which just pass humans by. There's a kind of 'sixth sense' that some animals have which still defies explanation.

programme.title: Green Tree Ants: Friend Or Foe?
programme.desc: All over the tropics of Australia and Asia, local armies of 500,000 soldiers are on standby. They are the terrifyingly organised, frighteningly violent, green tree ants. In their super-sized satellite outposts, we investigate their rise to power.

programme.title: Orphans of the Wild
programme.desc: Establishing the hiararchy within a troop of adult baboons is serious business but when a wild leopard gets trapped the adrenalin really starts pumping.

programme.title: Orphans of the Wild
programme.desc: Three adult lions and two wild leopards must swap enclosures, a dangerous exercise and if things can go wrong, they will.

programme.title: Orphans of the Wild
programme.desc: Umbili and Shakira, the leopard cubs, are becoming a real threat to Zacheo's safety and they must be moved, on a more comical note the baby baboons are moved in with the juveniles.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home over 2000 moose! And these notorious animals are running riot. Crossing busy highways, giving birth in backyards, and even doing battle in suburbia! But life on the streets is fraught with danger in this expanding city.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Most of the year it's encased in ice but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, but the wildlife built to withstand Alaskan winters, often struggle in the summer heat!

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Alaska is one of the last true wildernesses on earth. But in Anchorage you don't have to head into to the wild to discover the wildlife. With a city that has so much green space, it means everywhere is fair game for its wild neighbours.

programme.title: Wild And Alive
programme.desc: On the savannah of southern Africa, rains have turned the land green and lush. It's the time of plenty and for the cast of wild characters here, cashing in is priority number one.

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.desc: We follow FOUR PAWS' efforts to give captive lions a better life. A family of five lions who suffered a harsh life in a Romanian zoo, are given a new home, and a new lease on life and we take a look at a shocking, yet legal industry.

programme.title: Lock Stock And Two Smoking Tikkas

programme.title: My Yellow Table
programme.desc: A cookery show wherein India's greatest master chef Kunal Kapoor shares his favourite recipes.

programme.title: Highway On My Plate
programme.desc: Meet Rocky and Mayur - the highway stars with an attitude! Their tastes change with every kilometer as they hitch-hike their way across the country.

programme.title: Mir Castle Complex, Belarus
programme.desc: Located in the small town center, Mir Castle's complex is one of the earliest monuments to exist to this day and the most essential. This centuries-old Castle, reflected magnificently in an adjoining pond, resembles a building straight out of fairy tales. The common name 'mir' shared by the Castle and the town literally translates to 'peace' this justifies the fact that the Castle's sole purpose was built to bring harmony and peace to the region, followed by the signing of several peace treaties.

programme.title: Ling Sen Tong Temple, Malaysia
programme.desc: Follow the path that leads you to a picturesque garden with a beautiful pond at the centre. Located at the bottom of a limestone hill in Ipoh in Malaysia, Ling Sen Tong temple is a magnificent Taoist cave temple. Decorated with various statues of deities, animals and other Chinese folklore characters amidst the stalagmites and stalactites, this temple boasts of a majestic structure...

programme.title: Kursi, National Park, Israel
programme.desc: We are 30km west of Jerusalem, on the border between the Judean Mountains and the Ayalon Valley, in the village of Nicopolis. You may know it better as Emmaus. Here, thanks to its strategic position, Emmaus has played an important role in the country's administrative, military and economic life many times in its history.

programme.title: Arkady Monastery, Greece
programme.desc: The Arkadi Monastery situated on the island of Crete, in Rethymno, doesn't solely belong to this island it belongs to Greece, Europe, and to all five continents. It is a Heritage Site proclaimed European Monument of Freedom.

programme.title: Marmashen Monastery, Armenia
programme.desc: Here we are: in a beautiful valley on the left bank of Akhurian River, 10 km northwest of the city of Gyumri, 2 km southwest of the village of Vahramaberd in the Shirak region in Armenia. We are at Marmashen Monastery. Surrounded by fruit orchards this magnificent monument once was a prominent cultural and religious center and is considered as the finest example of the medieval architecture of Armenia…

programme.title: Akko (6000 years of History), Israel
programme.desc: One of the most fascinating city: Akko. Discover its historical heritage and enjoy a rare blend of East and West, authentic glimpses from the past, and unique mix of religious beliefs and remnants from different cultures. Akko is one of the most vital Ancient World cities where you can find traces of a great many nations and religious movements ranging from the Canaanites, the Romans, the Byzantines, the Crusaders, the Mamluks and the Turks to the British...

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Punta Del Este, Uruguay
programme.desc: With sprawling beaches, iconic monuments and a unique mix of colonial and modern architecture, it is the jewel of Uruguay's southern coast. Often called the “Pearl of the Atlantic”, likened with Miami and Cannes, it is the city of Punta del Este.

programme.title: Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Voronezh town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was finished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: Nish Fortress & Bali-Beg Mosque, Serbia
programme.desc: Like many other cities that have a history going back hundreds of years, the southern Serbian city of Nish has a fortress in its center. The fortres sis also home to three large mosques built by the Turcs. The Bali Beg mosque is a unique monument to Islam"&"ic architecture in Serbia.

programme.title: Mdina town, Malta
programme.desc: Factual documentary about Mdina town, Malta.Mdina also known by its titles Città Vecchia or Città Notabile, is a fortified city in the Northern Region of Malta which served as the island's capital from antiquity to the medieval period. The city is still c"&"onfined within its walls, and has a population of just under 300, but it is contiguous with the town of Rabat, which takes its name from the Arabic word for suburb, and has a population of over 11,000 (as of March 2014). The city was founded as Maleth in "&"around the 8th century BC by Phoenician settlers, and was later renamed Melite by the Romans. Ancient Melite was larger than present-day Mdina, and it was reduced to its present size during the Byzantine or Arab occupation of Malta. During the latter peri"&"od, the city adopted its present name, which derives from the Arabic word medina. The city remained the capital of Malta throughout the Middle Ages, until the arrival of the Order of St. John in 1530, when Birgu became the administrative centre of the isl"&"and. Mdina experienced a period of decline over the following centuries, although it saw a revival in the early 18th century. At this point, it acquired several Baroque features, although it did not lose its medieval character.Mdina remained the centre of"&" the Maltese nobility and religious authorities, but it never regained its pre-1530 importance, giving rise to the popular nickname the ""Silent City"" by both locals and visitors. Mdina is on the tentative list of UNESCO World Heritage Sites, and it is n"&"ow one of the main tourist attractions in Malta. Today, Mdina is one of Malta's major tourist attractions, hosting about 750,000 tourists a year. No cars are allowed in Mdina, partly why it has earned the nickname 'the Silent City'. The city displays an u"&"nusual mix of Norman and Baroque architecture, including several palaces, most of which serve as private homes.An extensive restoration of the city walls was undertaken between 2008 and 2016.

programme.title: Skopje A Blend Of Heritage, North Macedonia
programme.desc: While easily accessible from all points abroad and boasting all the amenities of the Western world, North Macedonia is still one of Europe's least discovered tourist destinations: a natural paradise of mountains, lakes, and rivers, where life moves to a "&"different rhythm, amidst the sprawling grandeur of rich historical ruins and idyllic villages that have remained practically unchanged for centuries. Skopje is the capital of the Republic of Macedonia in the center of the Balkan Peninsula. In different pe"&"riods of its history, the city was under Roman, Byzantine, and Ottoman rule.

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Perast is an old town on the Bay of Kotor in Montenegro. It is situated a few kilometres northwest of Kotor and is noted for its proximity to the islets of St. George and Our Lady of the Rocks.The city was founded by the Illyrians, named after one of the "&"local tribes—Pirusti.Perast lies beneath the hill of St. Ilija (873 m), on a cape that separates the Bay of Risano from that of Kotor, and overlooks the Verige strait, the narrowest part of the Bay of Kotor.

programme.title: Orhei Vechi Monastery Moldova
programme.desc: Old Orhei is a Moldovan historical and archaeological complex located in Trebujeni, which is approximately 60 kilometres (37 mi) north-east of Chişinău on the Răut River in the Republic of Moldova. The ancient city of Orheiul Vechi is a natural and histo"&"rical complex, located in a narrow bend of the Raut River. The natural landscape of limestone rock, eroded by the river, is combined with archaeological vestiges of the ancient Trypillian civilization. The Orthodox monastery is still inhabited by a handfu"&"l of Orthodox monks, who maintain the church at the top of the hill. The caves are still functional as chapels. The caves contain an array of historical artifacts.

programme.title: Ein Kerem, The Christian Revelation, Israel
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: Burano town, Italy
programme.desc: Burano is an island in the Venetian Lagoon, northern Italy, near Torcello at the northern end of the lagoon, known for its lace work and brightly coloured homes. The primary economy is tourism. Burano is 7 kilometres (4 miles) from Venice, a 45-minute tri"&"p from St. Mark's Square by vaporetto, a Venetian water bus.The island is linked to Mazzorbo by a bridge. The current population of Burano is about 2,400.

programme.title: Bosa Old town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: The beautiful Bosa Old Town finds itself in Alghero To Oristano, an area strongly influenced by Spanish culture. The city is generally considered to have been founded in 1102. However, long before the Christian era, the Phoenicians set up a trading post o"&"n this exposed bay in western Sardinia.

programme.title: Corinaldo old town, Italy
programme.desc: Let yourself be captivated by Corinaldo, an old city in the Italian region of Marche. Let's discover its powerful walls, its archaeological past, its rural landscape and the mythical Corinaldo's Fools. The lush and central Italian region of Marche is the "&"host of what has been dubbed, literally, Italy's prettiest village. Nestled within the Province of Ancona, Corinaldo's picturesque alleyways tell a story hundreds of years old.

programme.title: Carloforte Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Approximately 7 kilometers off the Southwestern Coast of Sardinia, there is an Island with rugged cliffs, no rivers, and a coastline full of beautiful coves. This is San Pietro. On this Island, only one town: Carloforte. It is an Italian village in Southe"&"rn Sardinia, as well as an honorary city of Genoa.

programme.title: Orgosolo Old Town Sardinia Italy
programme.desc: Situated in the middle of the Mediterranean Sea, Sardinia is an autonomous region in southwestern Italy, with a vast history and a charming natural environment. Unaffected by human settlement, its small villages and ancient cities still preserve their nat"&"ural composition. Orgosolo is one of them. It sits in a valley at the center of the rugged Supramonte mountains range, surrounded by a fascinating and charming natural landscape dominated by wild and unpolluted nature. The small village's territory is cha"&"racterized by an unparalleled environmental richness with uncontaminated woods, Mediterranean scrub, widespread endemics, and a varied fauna ranging from birds to reptiles.

programme.title: Atzara Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Atzara is a comune in the Province of Nuoro in the Italian region Sardinia, located about 90 kilometres north of Cagliari and about 45 kilometres southwest of Nuoro. Located in Barbagia, the original village date back to the years around 1000 and develope"&"d near the spring of Bingia de giosso, still existing.

programme.title: Survival Science

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: USA Through Film 3

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world. (S4 E03)

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere. (S4 E04)

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: For over 50 years, bikers from around the world have gathered in Colorado to race the Durango & Silverton Narrow Gauge Railroad Train through the Rocky Mountains, over two mountain passes. (S4 E01)

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: The Twin Cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul, while distinct in character, share a deep appreciation for music and cultural diversity. Chunz and Makh set out to discover the sounds and messages of unity emerging in the African community with traditional performer Christian Adeti and dive into a new genre of Somali rap with rapper DJ Fawzi. With it's vibrant modern culture and rich musical history, The Twin Cities are a special destination you won't want to miss.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Kansas City, Missouri, is an integral part of jazz history in America. Shaped by legends who once graced its streets, it is bursting with deep history, mouth-watering cuisine and a lively jazz scene. World-renowned trumpeter, tap dancer, and entertainer, Lonnie McFadden and celebrated singer and tap dancer Chloe McFadden, show Chunz and Makh what it's all about. From finger-licking barbecue to sports events and a bustling nightlife, this city is a cultural hub offering endless opportunities for a fun-filled getaway.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh discover Appalachian Mountain Music and clogging in the Blue Ridge mountains of Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: This time, Mike's planned 48 hours in New Mexico... And he's determined to show the guys as much of it as possible!! From the White Sands National Park, to Hatch, Santa Fe, Albuquerque and Taos! How do you think he'll get on??!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!

programme.title: Lucky in Love
programme.desc: Danny and Mara try their luck in the Flip Side of Florida, Jacksonville.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson explores the adventurous side of St. Petersburg Clearwater, Florida Charleston, South Carolina and Juneau, Alaska.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh embark on a fun-filled voyage through The Upper Peninsula of Michigan to experience the Sea Songs of the Great Lakes. Adventure is abound as they trek through lush forests, stunning waterfalls and even explore a historic shipwreck. Along the way, they meet folk legends Dan Truckey and Lee Murdock, who introduce them to the captivating world of sailors' tunes. From Lake Ballads to Sea Shanties, their journey culminates at the treasured Hiawatha Folk Festival, where campfire songs and communal vibes celebrate the region's enduring charm.

programme.desc: Melodious bhajans by renowned singers.
